text.title: Project Integration Management Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the project-integration methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: charter_signed
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Project charter must be signed by Sponsor before delivery starts; un-signed charter = un-authorised project.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `charter-signed` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: cross_area_consistency
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Cross-area decisions (e.g., scope-cut affecting schedule + cost) must be reflected in ALL impacted baselines.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `cross-area-consistency` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: status_rag_roll_up
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Overall RAG must be roll-up of per-area RAG — never independent of areas.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `status-rag-roll-up` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: integrator_authority
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: PM must have documented authority to escalate cross-area conflict; integrator without authority = decoration.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `integrator-authority` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: baseline_versioning
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Baselines must carry version + approval date; replaced baselines retained in history.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `baseline-versioning` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-project-integration.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
